risk_summary: Field teams are logging consistently, but office review cycles remain uneven across active projects.
recommendation_1: Launch superintendent mobile office hours for three priority jobs.
recommendation_2: Create a weekly submittal aging review with project managers.
recommendation_3: Publish adoption targets by role for the next 30 days.

risk_summary: Adoption improved after superintendent enablement, but submittal throughput still trails RFI activity.
recommendation_1: Pair high-performing superintendents with two lagging project teams.
recommendation_2: Create dashboard alerts for overdue submittal responses.
recommendation_3: Review license assignments for inactive office users.

risk_summary: Mobile usage crossed the halfway mark, while document workflows need tighter ownership.
recommendation_1: Add mobile checklist coaching to foreman huddles.
recommendation_2: Assign a submittal coordinator for projects over $25M.
recommendation_3: Reconcile inactive users before the next renewal cycle.

risk_summary: RFI consistency is strong, but submittals continue to create schedule risk on complex jobs.
recommendation_1: Run a two-week submittal response sprint with PM leadership.
recommendation_2: Build saved views for overdue submittals and aging RFIs.
recommendation_3: Use project launch templates for every new active project.

risk_summary: Adoption is now healthy across field workflows, with remaining risk concentrated in document review habits.
recommendation_1: Review submittal bottlenecks in the monthly executive meeting.
recommendation_2: Expand mobile coaching to subcontractor-facing teams.
recommendation_3: Document best practices from the top three active projects.

risk_summary: Usage is trending positively, but the team needs sustained governance to prevent backsliding after rollout momentum slows.
recommendation_1: Set a 90-day adoption governance cadence with executive sponsorship.
recommendation_2: Tie submittal response targets to project health reviews.
recommendation_3: Create role-based onboarding for new project starts.
